subject: 🚀 Exclusive: Scaling Glide Apps in 2026
previewText: Join our lead engineer for a deep dive into the new API features.
main_rich_text:
Level up your Glide workflow

Hi there, we've noticed you're pushing the limits of what's possible on the Glide platform. To help you scale faster, we're hosting a live session on advanced data syncing and local automation bridges.
